# Qwen3 30B-A3B MoE — PROMPT (prefill chunk, BS=16, ip=128) — 48 unique rows from 48 layers.
#
# One row per unique (num_ops, sorted-desc M) pattern observed in
# the *largest* prefill forward pass. Identical patterns across
# layers are merged. The trailing per-line `# freq=N layers=[...]`
# comment records the number of layers that had this exact pattern
# (= len(layers=[...])); the `layers=[i,j,...]` list itself is
# preserved for traceability only.
#
# Selected pass: tokens=1921, total_M=15368 (= tokens * topk).
# All prefill passes detected: (tokens=128, sum=1024, recs=48), (tokens=1921, sum=15368, recs=48)
# (vLLM CPU scheduler chunks the prefill — typically the first prompt is
#  prefilled alone, then the rest are batched together with the first decode token.)
#
# Architecture: 128 experts, topk=8, 48 transformer layers
# hidden_size=2048, intermediate_size=768, act=silu_and_mul (act=1)
#
# Format: num_ops, M_per_op, K, N, iters, src:wei:dst, weights_const, warmup, moe_topk, gated_act, N_down, use_internal_alloc, total_experts
#   use_internal_alloc=1; total_experts=128
#   iters/warmup recomputed from sum_M: sum_M>=16384 -> 20/5; >=4096 -> 50/10; <4096 -> 100/20.
#   Trailing per-line `# freq=N layers=[...]` preserves source occurrence info (layers omitted for decode files).

# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
# PROMPT (deduped): tokens=1921, topk=8 → total_M=15368
# ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
#
